site.title: Fisioteràpia Avança
site.description: Advanced physiotherapy center. Recover your wellbeing with the best professionals.

hero.title: Recover your movement, recover your life
hero.subtitle: Advanced physiotherapy with the best professionals and cutting-edge technology at your fingertips.

items.title: Sports Physiotherapy
items.description: Prevention and recovery of sports injuries with advanced techniques.

items.title: Rehabilitation
items.description: Personalized post-injury or post-surgical recovery programs.

items.title: Manual Therapy
items.description: Manual techniques to relieve pain and improve joint mobility.

items.title: Pediatric Physiotherapy
items.description: Specialized care for children's motor development.

items.title: Dry Needling
items.description: Effective treatment for trigger points and chronic myofascial pain.

items.title: Therapeutic Exercise
items.description: Individualized exercise plan to strengthen and prevent relapses.

members.name: Dr. Anna Martínez
members.bio: Specialist in manual therapy and sports rehabilitation with over 15 years of experience.

members.name: Dr. Carles Puig
members.bio: Expert in osteopathic techniques and chronic pain treatment.

members.name: Laia Font
members.bio: Dedicated to children's motor development and early intervention.

members.name: Marc Soler
members.bio: Physical trainer and high-performance sports readaptation specialist.

items.name: Marta R.
items.text: After a chronic back injury, I have finally found relief. The team is incredible.

items.name: Jordi P.
items.text: They helped me get back to running after a knee injury. Professional and very caring.

items.name: Gemma L.
items.text: I've been bringing my son since he was 3 and the progress has been spectacular. Highly recommended.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: Fisioteràpia Avança, located at Avda. Blondel, 98, 25002 Lleida, is the data controller responsible for processing personal data.
privacy.s2_text: The data provided will be processed for the purpose of managing the professional relationship, responding to inquiries, and sending information about our services.
privacy.s3_text: Data processing is based on the user's consent and the execution of the professional relationship.
privacy.s4_text: Data will be retained for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected and to determine any potential liabilities that may arise.
privacy.s5_text: Users may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection by sending an email to fisio@traumare.com.
privacy.s6_text: We apply the necessary technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of personal data.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.s1_text: In compliance with Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services, we inform you that the owner of this website is Fisioteràpia Avança, with pending tax ID, located at Avda. Blondel, 98, 25002 Lleida, and email fisio@traumare.com.
legal.s2_text: Access and use of this website confers the status of user and implies full acceptance of the terms of use established herein.
legal.s3_text: All website content (texts, images, logos, design) is owned by the owner or third parties who have authorized its use.
legal.s4_text: The owner is not responsible for damages that may arise from information published on the website, provided it has been manipulated or introduced by third parties.
legal.s5_text: The applicable law in case of dispute or conflict of interpretation of the terms shall be Spanish law.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1_text: Cookies are small text files that websites install on the user's computer or mobile device. They allow the website to remember information about the visit.
cookies.s2_text: This website uses technical cookies necessary for the operation of the site and analytical cookies that help us understand how users interact with the site.
cookies.s3_text: Some third-party services, such as Google Maps, may install their own cookies. We recommend reviewing their policies.
cookies.s4_text: Users can configure their browser to reject all or some cookies. Disabling technical cookies may affect the website's functionality.
cookies.s5_text: For more information about data processing, please consult our Privacy Policy or contact us at fisio@traumare.com.
